creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
One difference I notice is that you're using poudriere (3.4.2) and I'm using poudriere-devel (3.4.99.20240811).

I wonder if there has been an update in poudriere-devel that fixes something about fetching? Or maybe a bug that permits it unexpectedly?

And do the package builders use poudriere or poudriere-devel?

Anyway that's the most noticeable difference in build environment to me.
